clients.name: Drink Water
clients.description: Drink Water is a simple and intuitive app designed to remind you to stay hydrated throughout the day.

clientScopes.name: roles
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add user roles to the access token

clientScopes.name: acr
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add acr (authentication context class reference) to the token

clientScopes.name: basic
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add all basic claims to the token

clientScopes.name: web-origins
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add allowed web origins to the access token

clientScopes.name: organization
clientScopes.description: Additional claims about the organization a subject belongs to

clientScopes.name: service_account
clientScopes.description: Specific scope for a client enabled for service accounts

attributes.consent.screen.text: Permanently delete your account and all associated data

clientScopes.name: drinkwater:v1:waterintake:entry:read
clientScopes.description: Read a specific water intake entry

clientScopes.name: drinkwater:v1:waterintake:entry:create
clientScopes.description: Create a new water intake entry

clientScopes.name: drinkwater:v1:waterintake:entry:update
clientScopes.description: Update an existing water intake entry

attributes.consent.screen.text: Edit your existing water intake records

clientScopes.name: drinkwater:v1:waterintake:entries:search
clientScopes.description: Search and filter water intake entries

attributes.consent.screen.text: Search and filter your water intake history

clientScopes.name: drinkwater:v1:admin:config:read
clientScopes.description: Read runtime configuration and logging status
